data.name: Error.Generic
data.value: What am I supposed to do with this?

data.name: Error.InvalidLinkFormat
data.value: What am I supposed to do with this? The link format is incorrect.

data.name: Error.LinkProcessingFailed
data.value: Failed to process the link. Try again later. If the issue persists, the link may not be supported or an error occurred during media download.

data.name: Error.UserNotFoundByLink
data.value: No user found with this link.

data.name: Error.UserNotFoundById
data.value: No user found with this ID.

data.name: Error.Mute.InvalidTimeFormat
data.value: Please enter the mute duration in seconds or a date in the format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS. Or type 'Indefinitely'.

data.name: Error.Mute.NotActive
data.value: The contact is not currently muted.

data.name: Error.Input.InvalidValues
data.value: Invalid input. Please enter values separated by spaces.

data.name: Error.Input.NoUsersFound
data.value: No users found with the specified IDs.

data.name: Error.DomainFilter.NotEnabled
data.value: You need to enable the domain filter at least once first.

data.name: Error.DomainFilter.NoDomains
data.value: You need to add at least one domain first.

data.name: Error.AccessDenied
data.value: Access to the bot is currently restricted for new users. If you wish to gain access, you can contact me here

data.name: Error.Input.Generic
data.value: An error occurred. Please ensure you entered the correct data.
